title: William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi
tagline: William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi — spiritual town of Karnataka

heroImage.alt: William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi, Karnataka

overview.short: The William Arthur Memorial Church is located on the Bangalore-Honavar Road at Gubbi Town, about 80 km from Bangalore.
overview.description: The William Arthur Memorial Church is located on the Bangalore-Honavar Road at Gubbi Town, about 80 km from Bangalore. The church is painted brick red and built in the Gothic style, being completed in 1904. The church is named after William Arthur, an Irish Wesleyan missionary and Canarese scholar, who served in Gubbi. The present structure replacing the old Gobbee Chapel, built by Thomas Hodson.

topPlaces.name: Gubbi
topPlaces.description: Gubbi, formerly known as Amaragonda, is a town located in the Tumakuru District of Karnataka, India. It lies 20 km from Tumakuru and 90 km from Bengaluru along NH-206 (BH Road).

topPlaces.name: Adagoor, Tumkur
topPlaces.description: Adagoor (Gubbi) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Gubbi taluk of Tumkur district.

topPlaces.name: Mathighatta, Chiknayakanhalli
topPlaces.description: Mathighatta is a village in Chikkanayakahalli Taluk, Tumkur District, Karnataka, India. It is situated along the Karnataka State Highway 73, about 24 kilometres west of the district seat Tumkur, and 33 kilometres southeast of the taluk seat Chikkanayakana Halli.

topPlaces.name: Adlapura
topPlaces.description: Adlapura is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Tumkur taluk of Tumkur district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Nittur
topPlaces.description: Nittur is a village in the Tumkur district of Karnataka, India. Nittur is famous for Jwalamalini Temple, an ancient Jain centre.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi?
faq.a: The best time to visit William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (83 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (77 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi?
faq.a: Stays in William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in William Arthur Memorial Church, Gubbi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gubbi, Adagoor, Tumkur, Mathighatta, Chiknayakanhalli, Adlapura, Nittur.
